transcript: style="width: 87%; text-align:left;" |Uh... I was put on hold.
style="width: 87%; text-align:left;" |Okay, and what were you looking for?

style="width: 87%; text-align:left;" |Um... nothin'. Somebody called me at Chic-Fil-A in Park Meadows Mall. [to someone in background] Do you need sauce or anything with that? [to phone] Somebody called me and put me on hold.
style="width: 87%; text-align:left;" |Um... [to people in background] Did anyone call Chic-Fil-A...?
style="width: 87%; text-align:left;" |[to someone in background] Sauces?
style="width: 87%; text-align:left;" |[to people in background] At the mall?
style="width: 87%; text-align:left;" |[to someone in background] Barbeque, honey mustard, sweet and sour.
style="width: 87%; text-align:left;" |Um... I'm sorry, uh... this is Wax Trax Records. I don't know why anyone would have called you.
